---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for Orqis
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

Describe the problem you're trying to solve or the use case you have.
Why does Orqis not already cover this?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. If you have an API sketch, include it:

```ts
// Example of what the new API might look like
const queue = new TaskQueue({ concurrency: 3 });
```

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've already considered.

## Additional context

Links to prior art, related issues, or other libraries that do this.
